description: This node when provided an Animation Asset will search the animation's AnimJ data for a field on an object

fields.Animation: The Animation Asset provided by an IAssetProvider.
fields.Node: A String that is usually the name of the slot which has it's property animated. This can vary though, and AnimJ explains this.
fields.Property: A String that is usually the human name of a field. So a floatQ would be Rotation for a Property. This can vary though, and AnimJ explains this.
fields.* ([[Types:Int|Int]]): The index in a list of drivers a Animator would have when using the Animation (Animation Asset) provided to this node. The animation would be put into the ``Clip`` Field.
